note: BLOCK LAG cascade indicator simplified to show only the V12 7-step triangular cascade (arms at 540s, +1 step every 60s, capped at n=7 / drop=28, floor E7). Removed the vestigial V10 granular relief label and the time-based 1-level/60s counter — V10 granular, V9 staged and V8 cliff are historical branches that do not execute at the current height. The dynamic line now shows the actual cascade state: cascade arms in Ns / n=N · drop=X · next n=Y (drop=Z) in Ns / cascade capped at n=7, drop=28. Source: compute_v11_cascade_drop_triangular_h in src/pow/casert.cpp. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) if your browser caches the old build.
